rewritten_requirements: The system shall store an application in a pending state during review.
The system shall update the application status to either approved or rejected after review.
The system shall finalize the application process once a decision is made.
The system shall mark every application as finalized upon process completion.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system must store an application in a pending state while it is being reviewed.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: 'When someone submits an application, it remains pending while it is being reviewed.'

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: After review, the system must update the application status to either approved or rejected.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: 'After review, the application is either approved or rejected.'

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Once a decision is made, the system must finalize the application process.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: 'Once a decision is made, the process continues toward completion.'

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system must mark every application as finalized upon completion of the process.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: 'In both cases, whether approved or rejected, the application is finalized at the end, marking the completion of the process.'
